customer_impact_if_weak: If weak, leaders cannot see performance issues in risk and compliance early enough to protect cross-metric / multiple.
severity_band_logic: Scores 1-2 = Critical / Weak; Score 3 = Developing; Scores 4-5 = Strong / Managed
